Change 1: Replace:
  # ----- genre handling (with possible stylisticOrigin of the genre) -----
          genre_triples = [t for t in triples_here if t.predicate == "genre"]
          if genre_triples:
              genre_obj = genre_triples[0].object
              phrase = f"{subj} performs {lc(genre_obj)} music"
              # look for a triple where the genre is the subject and has stylisticOrigin

                  if t.subject == genre_obj and t.predicate == "stylisticOrigin":
                      phrase += f", which originated from {lc(t.object)}"
                      break
              parts.append(phrase)
with:
  # ----- genre handling (with possible stylisticOrigin of the genre) -----
          genre_triples = [t for t in triples_here if t.predicate == "genre"]
          if genre_triples:
              genre_phrases = []
              for gt in genre_triples:
                  g = gt.object
                  # avoid duplicate “music” word
                  g_display = g if "music" in g.lower() else f"{g} music"
                  phrase = f"{subj} plays {lc(g_display)}"
                  # check for stylisticOrigin where the genre is subject
                  for t in triples:
                      if t.subject == g and t.predicate == "stylisticOrigin":
                          phrase += f", which originated from {lc(t.object)}"
                          break
                  genre_phrases.append(phrase)
              # join multiple genre clauses with “and”
              if len(genre_phrases) == 1:
                  parts.append(genre_phrases[0])
              else:
                  parts.append(" and ".join(genre_phrases))
